lines.text: Ah, more seekers. What brings you to these halls?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Sir Gilberto...? Oh, Gilberto from the Fisalia family.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: A pious soul, frequently here in prayer. But not today, it seems.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: I've heard whispers of you. An Acolyte mentioned your desire to meet the Sentinel. I assume you must be interested in following Their path.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: But I don't think you truly understand the significance of the Carnevale. Allow me to explain.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: You've probably heard about the connection between the Carnevale and the Sentinel, but do you know why the Carnevale hasn't been held for years?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: In the last Carnevale, a sea fog shrouded the entire city. Echoes paraded like lost souls, a dragon roared above, and a beast in the sea stirred up towering waves…
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: It was sent as punishment and warning against our indulgence and division.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: This is our Primus, Fenrico, the Enlightened One.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Amidst that chaos, he stepped forward and quelled the Sentinel's wrath.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Ragunna's greatness was forged from its battles with the sea. It inspired a common goal in all our hearts.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Without everyone working together, land cannot be cultivated, islands cannot unite, and dams cannot be built. A nation's strength lies in its unity.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: You see, this is why we preach restraint and control over our desires. Only through rituals can we strengthen our resolve, our unity!
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: This is why we must banish those who stray from the right path and impose restrictions on those who threaten the common good.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: We've dedicated ourselves to this cause.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Hehe, you misunderstand me.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: I simply mean that the Order's actions are always made with great deliberation.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Guided by the Sentinel, we strive to unite and lead the people. We hope to build a kingdom on high, a land of the blessed… As it was in the beginning, and ever shall be.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: I trust you'll have faith in the Order's judgment. We handle all matters that come to our attention.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: ...What did you say? How could the Montelli family...
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Forgive me, I must attend to pressing matters.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: If you have further questions, seek answers in the cathedral. We are always open to those in search of truth.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: But I remind you to keep your distance from the sacred relics and honor our customs. Otherwise, we will have no choice but to address any act of disrespect.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: A word of caution. Don't overstep. We can't afford unwanted scrutiny.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Our sanctuary isn't infinite. Some murmurs are getting harder to quiet.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Stand down. Enough blood has been shed today. Imperator would not revel in senseless sacrifice.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: And the Pilgrim's Sail is for the transgressors to seek rebirth, not for you to threaten our friends. Repent for your reckless words.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Ah, honored guest. You have been misinformed, as the truth is not what it seems. My lord Fenrico has arranged your audience with the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Why not hear the Sentinel's wisdom for yourself?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Oh, you stubborn people of little faith. You've surely been tempted by evil and swallowed its lies. Lord Fenrico is the undeniable Enlightened One and will guide us all.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Well, I see no point in debating doctrine with you. Let's move on to a more concrete subject. Now, Miss Carlotta, which one do you think is more important to the Montelli family?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Is it "Profit"…
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: …or "Bloodline"?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Good question. What did we do indeed? Quite a faithful one he was.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Wouldn't hand over this pendant, the emblem of his faith... but we managed to persuade him.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Whether he should be deemed faithful now depends entirely on your actions. And you know what will become of him if we decide his devotion is weak and unworthy.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Raise your weapon, faithful Carlotta. Choose wisely now… Where shall you aim? Whose heart will taste your bullet?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Good. You are a smart one, Miss Carlotta.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Excellent. It appears you've made the right choice as any true Ragunnesi would, honoring blood and faith alike.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Pull the trigger. End this transgressor's life. The Sentinel shall host a supreme banquet for you in the high heavens.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: …You've disappointed me, Miss Carlotta.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: So be it. I shouldn't question your faith over such a mishap... It is after all insignificant in the grand scheme of the Divinity.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Let us bear witness, to the moment divine wrath descends from the heavens.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
